issues.description: Card has 'Choose one' mechanic with two distinct paths. DSL includes three separate effects without proper mutual exclusion logic. First effect with 'Trigger' (no OnPlay) is orphaned and semantically incorrect.
First effect has trigger:'Trigger' with DrawCard action - this appears to be residual/incorrect. Should be removed or integrated into the choose-one structure.

Third effect uses condition:'Always' but should be mutually exclusive with second effect. Card text specifies 'If your opponent has 1 Life card' - this condition is missing. Should be: {"type":"HasLifeCount","count":1,"target":"opponent"} or similar.

DSL does not properly express 'Choose one' mechanics. Current structure treats both paths as independently triggerable. Recommend using choice/alternative action grouping if DSL supports it, or restructure as conditional branching.
